records.question: Which movie titled Just My Luck has the tagline Everything changed in the wink of an eye., a popularity of 22.074306, a vote average of 5.8, and includes an Author in its crew?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT movie.movie_id FROM movie
JOIN movie_crew ON movie.movie_id = movie_crew.movie_id
JOIN department ON movie_crew.department_id = department.department_id
WHERE movie.tagline = 'Everything changed in the wink of an eye.' AND movie_crew.job = 'Author' AND movie.title = 'Just My Luck' AND movie.popularity = 22.074306 AND movie.vote_average = 5.8
records.pred_sql:
SELECT m.movie_id
FROM movie m
WHERE m.title = 'Just My Luck'
  AND m.tagline = 'Everything changed in the wink of an eye.'
  AND m.popularity = 22.074306
  AND m.vote_average = 5.8
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM movie_crew mc
    WHERE mc.movie_id = m.movie_id
      AND mc.job = 'Author'
  )

FROM movie
WHERE movie.release_date <= '1985-03-27'
  AND movie.revenue = 18432000
  AND movie.tagline = 'No force in Heaven will release them. No power on Earth can save them.'
  AND movie.movie_status = 'Released'
  AND movie.vote_count <= 260

records.question: Which movies have a vote average of 6.9, a revenue of 62172050, a budget at most 74500000, a popularity of 8.884318, the title 'Deux frères', the tagline 'Two infant tiger cubs, separated from their parents and each other.', a movie status of 'Released', a release date of '2004-04-07', and also have associated movie genres, movie languages, and production countries?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT movie.movie_id FROM movie
JOIN movie_genres ON movie.movie_id = movie_genres.movie_id
JOIN movie_languages ON movie.movie_id = movie_languages.movie_id
JOIN production_country ON movie.movie_id = production_country.movie_id
WHERE movie.vote_average = 6.9 AND movie.revenue = 62172050 AND movie.budget <= 74500000 AND movie.popularity = 8.884318 AND movie.title = 'Deux frères' AND movie.tagline = 'Two infant tiger cubs, separated from their parents and each other.' AND movie.movie_status = 'Released' AND movie.release_date = '2004-04-07'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.movie_id
FROM movie m
WHERE m.vote_average = 6.9
  AND m.revenue = 62172050
  AND m.budget <= 74500000
  AND m.popularity = 8.884318
  AND m.title = 'Deux frères'
  AND m.tagline = 'Two infant tiger cubs, separated from their parents and each other.'
  AND m.movie_status = 'Released'
  AND m.release_date = '2004-04-07'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM movie_genres WHERE movie_genres.movie_id = m.movie_id)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM movie_languages WHERE movie_languages.movie_id = m.movie_id)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM production_country WHERE production_country.movie_id = m.movie_id)

JOIN movie_languages ON movie.movie_id = movie_languages.movie_id
JOIN movie_crew ON movie.movie_id = movie_crew.movie_id
JOIN production_country ON movie.movie_id = production_country.movie_id
WHERE movie.vote_count = 848 AND movie.budget >= 51500000
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.movie_id
FROM movie m
WHERE m.vote_count = 848
  AND m.budget >= 51500000
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM movie_genres WHERE movie_id = m.movie_id)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM movie_languages WHERE movie_id = m.movie_id)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM movie_crew WHERE movie_id = m.movie_id)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM production_country WHERE movie_id = m.movie_id)

records.question: What movies titled Lawrence of Arabia have at least 851 votes, run for at least 216 minutes, were released on or after 1962-12-10, have a budget of at most 15000000, a revenue exactly equal to 69995385, and include cast members with a cast order of at most 45?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT movie.movie_id FROM movie
JOIN movie_genres ON movie.movie_id = movie_genres.movie_id
JOIN movie_languages ON movie.movie_id = movie_languages.movie_id
JOIN movie_crew ON movie.movie_id = movie_crew.movie_id
JOIN movie_cast ON movie.movie_id = movie_cast.movie_id
WHERE movie.vote_count >= 851 AND movie.title = 'Lawrence of Arabia' AND movie.runtime >= 216 AND movie.budget <= 15000000 AND movie_cast.cast_order <= 45 AND movie.release_date >= '1962-12-10' AND movie.revenue = 69995385
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.movie_id
FROM movie m
LEFT JOIN movie_cast mc ON m.movie_id = mc.movie_id
WHERE m.title = 'Lawrence of Arabia'
  AND m.vote_count >= 851
  AND m.runtime >= 216
  AND m.release_date >= '1962-12-10'
  AND m.budget <= 15000000
  AND m.revenue = 69995385
  AND (mc.cast_order IS NULL OR mc.cast_order <= 45)
